methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs aligned to the merged internal-domain structure: a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, explicit team ownership, and sparing use of commitments.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe meaningful business and customer outcomes, not feature delivery.
Source objectives map into a small number of company objectives spanning the merged internal domain.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Improve demand, service, and employee operating flow
companyObjectives.statement: Make the internal operating system easier to run across revenue generation, shared services, finance flow, and employee work.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Connects commercial and operational flow rather than treating them as isolated programs.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Marketing needs faster handoff loops with sales
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Shows why internal handoff quality and attribution clarity matter for growth.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Employees lose time when work starts in too many places
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Shows why the employee work hub is part of the same operating-flow problem.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Increase automation leverage without losing trust
companyObjectives.statement: Scale reusable internal workflow automation while improving governance, evidence, and operating confidence.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Creates one umbrella for platform leverage and control posture.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: AI value in enterprises depends on workflow guardrails
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Makes governance a core part of the operating model rather than an add-on.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Internal product portfolios must be evaluated on leverage
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Anchors the objective in reusable internal leverage rather than local optimization.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Chief Marketing Officer / VP Marketing outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve demand generation quality and operating efficiency through better audience, attribution, and handoff workflows.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline established from current operating telemetry
keyResults.statement: Increase Marketing-Sourced Pipeline during the quarter.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to improve Marketing-Sourced Pipeline through the team's owned workflow surfaces and product bricks.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR with platform, data, or domain capabilities relevant to Marketing-Sourced Pipeline.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: Pursue as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

target1.label: next quarter target
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: Marketing-Sourced Pipeline moves materially in the right direction by next quarter.

target2.label: year-end target
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: Marketing-Sourced Pipeline sustains improvement through year end.
